tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
My first tab, going off of the Soul Kitchen Youtube video before this song has been released, the words may
not be 100% accurate.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L8slSQNrgFQ


[Intro]

[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  x2


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Every night around about this time[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
It's like she knows I'm lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Rolls up when the wine is gone[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Like a record on repeat[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Leaning on old memories[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Talkin' 'bout what we used to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
She'll probably be the death of me[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
But, damn if it ain't sweet[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
My heartache in the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
With a kiss on her lips just like cyanide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah, she came with a warning[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
But I didn't mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
I'll go out on that high every time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
My pretty little poison[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Shadows dancing down the hall[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Whispers that she wants me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Try my best not to fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
When she falls into me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
We all need some kind of fix[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
For me she's the one I pick[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Nothing else will do the trick[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
She's all I need[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
My heartache in the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
With a kiss on her lips just like cyanide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah, she came with a warning[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
But I didn't mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
I'll go out on that high every time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
My pretty little poison[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
For some, I guess, it's alcohol[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I don't want none at all[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I just want you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
No, I just want you[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
My heartache in the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
With a kiss on her lips just like cyanide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah, she came with a warning[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
But I didn't mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
I'll go out on that high every time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
She's my pretty little poison[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
My pretty little poison[/tab]


[Outro]

[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
